metadata.title:
TO BRAND DICK


BLACK SHEEP

COMING CITY CAMPAIGN IN
FLUENcE DEVELOPS IN MIR,
ING POLITICS WITH BILLY


SUNDAY REVIVAL SERVICES.

pages.raw_text:
Spokane observers are mingling
amusement with disgust today at
the political use that is to be made
of Billy Sunday here, according to
the forecast in morning paper.
Billy, it appears, has been furnish
ed with a list of the sheep and the
goats among the Spokane delega-
ton in regard to saloon regulation
laws and he is going to separate
the flock at the mems meeting next
Sunday.


In this list Senator Hutchinson,
bluff old Dick, is named as doubt
full" This does not suit the pur-
pose of the morning papers next
mayor making project and occasion
is taken to put Hutchinson entirely
in the wrong" class.


Interested parties who have en-
deayored to persuade Dick as to
how he should interpret the last
republican platform will read this
grimly. Hutchinson is possessed
of the notion that the people elect
ed republicans to Office because
they wanted the platform prin-
ciples of that party carried out.
He even believes it to the extent
of standing solidly for bank guar
anty law. Although one of the
wealthy men of the country, he is
also an earnest advocate of the
initiative and referendum, as well
as any other sound principle of
popular government.


r Hutchinson's position on local
option is that Of the republican
party and he has never attempted
to conceal it. The result of the
election indicates that the republi.
can plan is what the people of the
state want. They rejected the
democratic prohibition plank by a
majority that left nothing to argue
over


If every other legislator is as
true to the platform as Hutchinson
will be, the state will get just ex-
